InviteMemberModal.title: Invite a team member
InviteMemberModal.description: Generate a link to share — valid for 7 days, the role is already set. If the person already has an account (for another establishment, for example), they'll simply be added to this one.
InviteMemberModal.hint: Valid for 7 days. Share it through the channel of your choice (SMS, WhatsApp, etc.).
InviteMemberModal.genericError: Couldn't generate the link. Try again.
